activity_summary: A support operations manager reviews refund escalation cases and decides approve, policy review, or missing evidence.
command_display: codex exec --model gpt-5.5 -c model_reasoning_effort="xhigh" --sandbox read-only --skip-git-repo-check --ephemeral --color never --output-schema <schema> --output-last-message <output> -
notes: GPT-5.5 output captured through codex for the JudgmentKit 3x4 model UI matrix.

parsed.summary: A raw refund_case operations console exposes the escalation decision alongside database fields, validation errors, prompt version, tool calls, resource id, API status, and CRUD controls.
parsed.css: .refund-console{box-sizing:border-box;min-height:900px;padding:24px;background:#f4f6f8;color:#1f2933;font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;font-size:14px;line-height:1.4}.refund-console *{box-sizing:border-box}.topbar{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;gap:16px;margin-bottom:16px}.eyebrow{margin:0 0 4px;color:#5b6770;font-size:12px;text-transform:uppercase}.title{margin:0;font-size:26px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0}.subtitle{margin:4px 0 0;color:#52606d}.status-strip{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:flex-end}.pill{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;height:28px;padding:0 10px;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid #cbd5df;background:#fff;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:#334e68}.pill.warn{border-color:#f0b429;background:#fff8e6;color:#8a5a00}.pill.ok{border-color:#56a582;background:#edf8f3;color:#17624a}.layout{display:grid;grid-template-columns:280px minmax(0,1fr) 340px;gap:16px;align-items:start}.panel{background:#fff;border:1px solid #d7dee7;border-radius:8px;box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(31,41,51,.06)}.panel-header{padding:14px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid #e4e9ef}.panel-header h2{margin:0;font-size:16px}.panel-header p{margin:4px 0 0;color:#66788a;font-size:13px}.queue-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column}.queue-item{padding:13px 14px;border:0;border-bottom:1px solid #edf1f5;background:#fff;text-align:left;color:#1f2933}.queue-item strong{display:block;font-size:14px}.queue-item span{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:8px;margin-top:4px;color:#607080;font-size:13px}.queue-item.selected{background:#eef6ff;border-left:4px solid #2f80ed;padding-left:10px}.case-body{padding:16px}.case-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px;margin-bottom:14px}.field{padding:10px 12px;border:1px solid #e1e7ed;border-radius:6px;background:#fbfcfd}.field label{display:block;margin-bottom:3px;color:#6b7886;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase}.field div{font-weight:700}.section-title{margin:18px 0 8px;font-size:15px}.evidence{margin:0;padding:0;list-style:none}.evidence li{display:flex;gap:8px;padding:8px 0;border-bottom:1px solid #edf1f5}.mark{width:20px;height:20px;border-radius:999px;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex:0 0 auto;font-size:12px;font-weight:700}.mark.good{background:#e7f6ef;color:#17624a}.mark.missing{background:#fff0f0;color:#b42318}.policy-box{padding:12px;border-left:4px solid #4b7bec;background:#f1f6ff;border-radius:6px;color:#243b53}.table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:13px}.table th,.table td{padding:8px 10px;border-bottom:1px solid #e7ecf2;text-align:left;vertical-align:top}.table th{color:#5b6770;background:#f8fafc;font-size:12px;text-transform:uppercase}.decision-panel{padding:14px}.decision-button{width:100%;height:40px;margin-bottom:8px;border:1px solid #b8c4d2;border-radius:6px;background:#fff;color:#1f2933;font-weight:700;text-align:left;padding:0 12px}.decision-button.primary{background:#1f7a5c;border-color:#1f7a5c;color:#fff}.decision-button.review{background:#eef4ff;border-color:#aac6f7;color:#1c4d8c}.decision-button[disabled]{background:#f2f4f7;color:#8b97a5}.handoff{width:100%;min-height:108px;resize:none;border:1px solid #cbd5df;border-radius:6px;padding:10px;font:inherit;color:#1f2933;background:#fbfcfd}.crud-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px;margin-top:10px}.crud-row button{height:34px;border:1px solid #cbd5df;border-radius:6px;background:#fff;font-weight:700}.crud-row .danger{border-color:#f0b4b4;color:#9f1d1d}.diagnostics{margin-top:16px}.diagnostic-block{padding:12px 14px;border-top:1px solid #e4e9ef}.diagnostic-block h3{margin:0 0 8px;font-size:14px}.code-line{margin:4px 0;padding:6px 8px;border-radius:5px;background:#f6f8fa;font-family:Consolas,Monaco,monospace;font-size:12px;color:#26323f}.error{border-left:3px solid #d92d20}.success{border-left:3px solid #1f7a5c}.muted{color:#65758b}.small{font-size:12px}
parsed.html:
Raw refund_case model workbench

Refund escalation triage

Manager decision surface for approval, policy review, or missing evidence handoff.

Selected case: R-1842Evidence incompleteGET /api/refund-cases/R-1842 200 OK

Escalation queue

refund_case rows

Case R-1842

Subscription renewal disputed after agent escalation.

Nora Diaz
Pro annual
$184.20
Evidence incomplete

Evidence from refund_case.evidence

  • OKRenewal date confirmed in purchase history.
  • OKSupport note captures the customer's refund reason.
  • !Receipt photo is missing before manager approval.

Policy text

Inside exception window. Manager approval is allowed when evidence is complete; unclear duplicate-charge cases go to policy review.

Exposed database table fields

FieldValueEdit state
idR-1842locked primary key
customerNora Diazeditable
planPro annualeditable
amount$184.20editable
requestSubscription renewal disputed after agent escalation.editable
statusEvidence incompleteeditable
evidence[0..2]renewal confirmed; refund reason captured; receipt missingarray editor
policyInside exception window; manager approval allowed when evidence is complete.read only

Decision and CRUD

Write the next action back to refund_case.

Implementation diagnostics

Raw brief requested schema, prompt, tool, resource, and endpoint details.

JSON schema validation errors

refund_case.evidence.receipt_photo: required property missing

refund_case.decision.reason: minLength pending manager handoff

Prompt template version

refund_triage_manager_v3.7.2

Tool call results

purchase_history.lookup: renewal_date_confirmed

support_notes.fetch: refund_reason_found

receipt_image.verify: no_file_uploaded

Resource and API status

resource id: refund_case:R-1842

GET /api/refund-cases/R-1842: 200 OK

PATCH /api/refund-cases/R-1842: not submitted
